case_title: ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. VS. DONALD ROBINSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $8.77 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. SERVED JAN-31-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1779 EDDY STREET, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
